title: senecio brevilingueus
intro: Senecio brevilingueus, also known as Short-stalked Jacob's Ladder, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Senecio brevilingueus include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of Senecio brevilingueus are often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
